Triggering the system-level 'high-tech park high-altitude semiconductor illusion' pulverization and the '0-employee chip design outsourcing/testing equipment purchasing shell' physical demotion probe. This enterprise, named 'Juce Optoelectronic Technology,' possesses a business license that reads like an intimidating 'Semiconductor and AI Manufacturing Epic': claiming to manufacture integrated circuit chips, special equipment for semiconductor devices, photovoltaic equipment, terminal testing equipment, and even develop basic artificial intelligence software. Unsurprisingly, the official system enshrined it on the top-tier altar of 'Electronic Device Manufacturing.' However, the forensic logic engine directly penetrated this extremely grandiose heavy-industry facade, grasping the most lethal contrasting data of the entire batch: the paid-in capital is a pitiful 370,000 RMB! The insured headcount is an absolute 0! The most fatal verdict comes from its highly incongruous spatial coordinates: 'Room 522, No. 33 Jingyou Road, Jiangning High-tech Park.' The logical deduction instantly turns into a dark comedy about the semiconductor industry: inside a 5th-floor single room (Room 522) of a high-tech park building, a boss who hasn't hired a single engineer or machine tool master, clutching a few hundred thousand in funds, claims to have built a 'semiconductor wafer fab' and an 'AI intelligent equipment manufacturing workshop' requiring tens of billions in investment and an absolutely dust-free environment? The probe mercilessly deleted all 'manufacturing, production' delusions from the license. The truth is starkly naked: this is a 100% pure 0-Employee High-Tech Park Shell & IC Design/Equipment Proxy. The boss is highly likely a middleman navigating the semiconductor circles or research institute projects, utilizing high-tech park policies to register this seemingly hardcore shell. When receiving outsourcing orders for chip design or AI software, they subcontract them to freelancers or small teams (acting as a tech pimp); when receiving orders from laboratories to buy testing instruments, they procure from manufacturers to earn the price difference. The official 'Electronic Manufacturing Entity' tag is the most absurd system-level elevation of such a high-tech middleman who makes a living purely by flipping resources.
